case.title: LAPIQUE v. DISTRICT COURT OF U S FOR SOUTHERN DIST OF

opinion.h1: LAPIQUE v. DISTRICT COURT OF U S FOR SOUTHERN DIST OF, 271 U.S. 649 (1926)
opinion.h2: John LAPIQUE v. The DISTRICT COURT OF THE UNITED STATES FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA. *
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John Lapique, of Los Angeles, Cal., in pro. per.
Motion for leave to file petition for writ of mandamus and motion for writ of error denied.
[Footnote *] Rehearing denied 272 U. S. -, 47 S. Ct. 96, 71 L. Ed. -.[ Lapique v. District Court of U S for Southern Dist of 271 U.S. 649 (1926) ]
